headline: BlackRock (BLK) Valuation Check After Recent Pullback And Strong Multi Year Returns
summary: BlackRock (BLK) is back on investor radar after recent trading left the shares roughly 4.5% lower over the past month, even as the past 3 months show a positive total return. See our latest analysis for BlackRock. At a share price of $1,068.31, BlackRock’s recent 4.5% 30 day share price decline contrasts with a 12.8% 1 year total shareholder return and a 65.6% 3 year total shareholder return. This suggests that longer term momentum has been stronger than the latest pullback. If this move has...
